comment: Your library is every exhibit you're authoring, gathered in one place. Open one to keep editing, or start a fresh exhibit.
_showoff: Box the whole grid; mention a single library can hold many exhibits that publish together.

comment: Bind your work to disk however you like — a folder, one portable .archie.zip, or stay browser-only. The current binding shows here and you can switch anytime.
_showoff: Three bindings = three rows if you want to split them out.

comment: Save status, always visible: Saved, Saving…, or Unsaved. Browser-only work persists in the browser; bind to a file for a copy you can move or back up.
_showoff: Capture a second shot mid-save to show the 'Saving…' state.

comment: Start an exhibit by bringing in media — images, audio, video, or a IIIF manifest URL.
_showoff: Links forward to S10 (full ingest dialog).

comment: Open a local image straight from the OS file dialog and annotate it offline — no server, no upload.
_showoff: This is a desktop-app (Tauri) superpower; tag it power and note the Flatpak build.
